description: Mhinduro yako inotibatsira kuronga zvese zvemhemberero.
Your reply helps us organize every detail of the celebration.
namePlaceholder: Enter your first and last name
allergiesHint: Ratidza chete kusawirirana kwechikafu uye kusashivirira.
Only indicate food allergies and intolerances.
privacyConsent: I have been informed and I accept the <link>Privacy Policy</link>
healthConsent: Ini ndinobvuma kugadziriswa kwedata rangu rehutano (allergies uye kusashivirira) kugadzirisa menyu yemuchato
I consent to the processing of my health data (allergies and intolerances) to adapt the wedding menu
alreadySubmitted: You have already confirmed your attendance
ageUnder14Warning: Uri pasi pemakore gumi nemana ekuberekwa.
You are under 14 years of age.
parentalConsent: Vabereki vangu kana vachengeti vanobvuma kuti nditore chikamu
My parents or guardians consent to my participation

nameRequired: Isa zita rako kuti usimbise kupinda.
Enter your name to confirm attendance.
privacyRequired: Iwe unofanirwa kugamuchira iyo Yakavanzika Policy.
You must accept the Privacy Policy.
ageUnder14: Uri pasi pemakore gumi nemana ekuberekwa.
You are under 14 years of age.
healthConsentRequired: Iwe unofanirwa kubvuma kugadziriswa kwehutano hwako data.
You must consent to the processing of your health data.
menuHeadcountRequired: Indicate at least one menu option.
guestNamesRequired: Enter the names of your companions.
guestNamesExceed: Iwe haugone kuisa mazita akawanda kupfuura shamwari.
You cannot enter more names than companions.
headcountExceed: Huwandu hwemamenu sarudzo haigone kudarika nhamba yevafambidzani.
The sum of menu options cannot exceed the number of companions.

saveError: We could not save your response.
withdrawConfirm: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kubvisa mhinduro yako?
Are you sure you want to withdraw your response?
headcountHint: Vanhu vangani pasarudzo yega yega ({{total}} yese)
How many people for each option ({{total}} total)
guestNamesHint: Nyora zita rekutanga nerekupedzisira remumwe nemumwe (max {{count}})
Write the first and last name of each companion (max {{count}})

notFoundText: Hatina kukwanisa kuwana kukokwa nelink iyi.
We couldn't find an invitation with this link.
emptyText: Gadzira uye ugovane yako yakasarudzika yekukoka kwemuchato.
Create and share your personalized wedding invitation.
emptyDescription: Tonga ruzivo rwako rwekukoka, govera chinongedzo chakasiyana nevaenzi vako, uye gamuchira maRSVP avo.
Manage your invitation details, share a unique link with your guests, and receive their RSVPs.
mapPreviewAlt: Map preview at the indicated location.

loadingText: We are loading your saved data.
successText: Yako data yachengetwa uye kukoka kwave kuwanikwa.
Your data has been saved and the invitation is now available.
godparentsHint: Kana iwe ukaisa rimwe zita, rimwe rinodiwawo.
If you enter one name, the other is also required.
backgroundText: Isa mufananidzo kana sarudza kumashure kwebutiro.
Upload a photo or choose a background for the cover.
couplePhotoHint: Photo of the couple for the cover.
audioHint: Isa faira rekuteerera kuti ritambe pachivharo (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A - max 5 MB).
Upload an audio file to play on the cover (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A — max 5 MB).
audioUploadSubtitle: MP3, WAV, OGG kana M4A - max 5 MB
MP3, WAV, OGG or M4A — max 5 MB
audioSizeError: Audio file exceeds the 5 MB limit.
placePlaceholder: Type the venue name to search...
placeHint: Nyora nzvimbo uye sarudza kubva pane zvawanikwa.
Type the venue and select from the results.
scheduleHint: Write the schedule, one line per event.
dressCodeHint: Select the dress code for the celebration.
accommodationHint: Mahotera, makodhi makodhi uye sarudzo dzevaenzi.
Hotels, discount codes and options for guests.
transportHint: Sarudzo dzekufambisa, zvirongwa zvebhazi, kupaka, nezvimwe.
Transport options, bus schedules, parking, etc.
kidsHint: Select the children policy for the celebration.
menuRequiredText: Zvinodiwa: dessert uye kanenge imwe huru menyu.
Required: dessert and at least one main menu.
menuTextoPlaceholder: Rondedzera menyu: kutanga, kosi huru, dessert ...
Describe the menu: starter, main course, dessert...
menuTextoHint: Describe the menu you have prepared.
storyHint: Runyoro rwemahara nezve nyaya yako yerudo.
Free text about your love story.
giftsInfoHint: Ratidza kana uchida zvipo zvemari, nhamba yeakaundi, nezvimwe.
Indicate if you prefer cash gifts, account number, etc.
bankInfoHint: Account number for transfers, if applicable.
privacyConsent: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy
setup.galleryTrimmed: {{max}} of {{selected}} images will be uploaded (gallery limit).

loadingConfig: We are retrieving your saved configuration.

restoreInvalid: The file does not have the expected format.

noResultsFilter: No results found with this filter.

description: Shandisa chikamu ichi kugadzira kodhi nyowani.
Use this section to generate a new code.
newTokenPlaceholder: Press «Generate» to create a new code
activeToken: Inoshanda kodhi (iwe chete iwe unogona kuiona).
Active code (only you can see it).
currentTokenDescription: Kuti ugadzire kodhi nyowani, isa iyo ikozvino kodhi yekuwana.
To generate a new code, enter the current access code.
deleteDataDescription: Kana iwe uchida kushandisa kodzero dzako dzekudzivirira data, unogona kudzima data rako rese.

title: Support
Support
2c0ebdaae5e241fe4f4a7730879c5e0c
tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
description: Kana iwe uine chero nyaya kana mibvunzo nezve kukokwa, unogona kubata mugadziri:
If you have any issues or questions about the invitation, you can contact the developer:
rightsDescription: Iwe unogona kukumbira kubviswa kana kutumira kunze kwe data rako pachako chero nguva zvinoenderana nekwako kutonga (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA kana POPIA).
You can request the deletion or export of your personal data at any time according to your jurisdiction (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA or POPIA).
rightsHint: Yako email mutengi inovhura neyakafanozadzwa template.
Your email client will open with a pre-filled template.
ccpaText: Wedingo does not sell personal data.
appDescription: Web application for managing wedding invitations.

title: Cookie mvumo
Cookie consent
2c0ebdaae5e241fe4f4a7730879c5e0c
tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
text: Wedingo inoshandisa chengetedzo yemunharaunda inodiwa kuti kukokwa kuite (kuchengetedza chikamu chako uye zvaunofarira).
Wedingo uses local storage necessary for the invitation to function (saving your session and preferences).

termsText: By using Wedingo you accept these terms.
legalText: Mukutevedzera mitemo inoshanda, ruzivo runotevera rwunopihwa:
In compliance with applicable laws, the following information is provided:

verifyTokenFirst: Verify the access code before saving.
acceptPrivacyPolicy: Iwe unofanirwa kugamuchira iyo Yakavanzika Policy kugadzira kukoka.
You must accept the Privacy Policy to create the invitation.
usernameRequired: Isa zita rekushandisa kuti ugozopinda gare gare.
Enter a username so you can log in later.
usernameInvalid: Zita rekushandisa rinongokwanisa kuva nemavara nenhamba chete.
Username can only contain letters and numbers.
usernameTooLong: Zita rekushandisa haringapfuuri mabhii makumi mashanu.
bothNamesRequired: Isa mazita ese kuti uenderere mberi.
dayInvalid: Zuva rinofanira kuva pakati pe1 ne31.
hourInvalid: Awa inofanira kuva pakati pe0 ne23.
minuteInvalid: Maminitsi anofanira kunge ari pakati pe00 ne59.
dateNotValid: Zuva rapinda harisi kushanda (semuenzaniso, Kukadzi 30 hakuna).
The date entered is not valid (e.g. February 30 does not exist).
dateBeforeToday: Zuva remuchato haringave risati rasvika nhasi.
The wedding date cannot be before today.
yearTooFar: The year cannot be later than {{year}}.
sectionOrderInvalid: The section order is not valid.
hiddenSectionsInvalid: The hidden sections are not valid.
godparentsRequired: Kana iwe ukapinza imwe godparent, mazita ose anodiwa.
If you enter one godparent, both names are required.
coverFirst: The cover must be the first section.
menuRequired: Rondedzera kanenge imwe huru menyu (nyama, hove kana vegan).
Describe at least one main menu (meat, fish or vegan).
ibanInvalid: The IBAN format is not valid.
galleryFormatInvalid: The gallery image format is not valid.
sectionOrderMismatch: Chikamu cheodha chine {{actual}} zvinhu, asi {{expected}} zvaitarisirwa.
The section order has {{actual}} items, but {{expected}} were expected.
messageTooLong: Meseji yekukoka haikwanise kudarika mavara mazana mashanu.
The invitation message cannot exceed 500 characters.
giftsTooLong: The gift information cannot exceed 2000 characters.
transportTooLong: The transport information cannot exceed 2000 characters.
invalidLink: The invitation link is not valid.
readImageFailed: Could not read the image file.
imageTooLarge: Mufananidzo wacho wakakurisa kunyange mushure mekudzvanyirirwa.
The image is too large even after compression.

superadmin.expiredInvitations: {{count}} invitation(s) over 12 months past the wedding date
expiredText: Zvinoenderana nemutemo wekuvanzika, iyi data inofanirwa kunge yakadzimwa otomatiki.
According to the privacy policy, this data should have been automatically deleted.
noResultsFilter: No invitations found with that criteria.
noTokensToClean: Hapana ma tokeni asina kushandiswa ekuchenesa.
firebaseAccount: Kugadzirisa yako superadmin account, shandisa Firebase console:
To manage your superadmin account, use the Firebase console:

deletedOne: Invitation {{token}} deleted with all its data.

title: Rekodhi yemabasa ekugadzirisa (Art. 30 GDPR)
Record of processing activities (Art. 30 GDPR)
2c0ebdaae5e241fe4f4a7730879c5e0c
tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
updated: Yakagadziridzwa: Chikunguru 2026. Rekodhi iyi inonyora zviitiko zvekugadzirisa data pachako muWedingo.
Updated: July 2026. This record documents personal data processing activities in Wedingo.
row1Data: Mazita evaviri, zuva, nzvimbo, dingindira, mafoto, mimhanzi, menyu, zvikamu
Couple names, date, venue, theme, photos, music, menu, sections
row2Data: Zita remuenzi, kupinda (hongu/kwete), kusarudzwa kwemenu, allergies, data yehutano
Guest name, attendance (yes/no), menu selection, allergies, health data
row4Purpose: Control access to the admin panel
row5Data: Superadmin zviito, tokeni dzakashandiswa, dzakadzimwa kukoka
Superadmin actions, used tokens, deleted invitations
internationalText: Dhata inochengetwa paGoogle Cloud maseva munharaunda yeur3 (Frankfurt, Germany).
Data is stored on Google Cloud servers in the eur3 region (Frankfurt, Germany).
dpf: Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US neSwitzerland-US
Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US and Switzerland-US
measureEncryption: AES-256-GCM encryption yemifananidzo uye data inonzwisisika (PBKDF2)
AES-256-GCM encryption of images and sensitive data (PBKDF2)
measureTls: HTTPS connection (TLS 1.3) across the entire platform
measureStorage: Minimal local storage with consent only
measureRetention: Kuchengeta mutemo: 12 mwedzi mushure mechiitiko che data yevaenzi
Retention policy: 12 months post-event for guest data
measureSuperadmin: Superadmin yakachengetedzwa neFirebase Authentication + yakavanzika nzira
Superadmin protected by Firebase Authentication + hidden route

godparentsText: With the blessing of their godparents
celebrationMessage: Tinotarisira kugovera nguva iyi yakakosha newe.
We look forward to sharing this special moment with you.
scheduleFallback: Hurongwa hwakadzama huchagoverwa munguva pfupi iri kutevera.
The detailed schedule will be shared soon.
storyFallback: The story will be shared soon.
bestGift: Your presence is the best gift
giftsFallback: Gift information will be shared soon.

sessionExists: There is already an active session for this invitation.
tokenInvalid: The access code is not valid.

codeUserMismatch: The code does not match this user.

invitationText: Tinotarisira kupemberera nguva iyi yakakosha newe.
We look forward to celebrating this special moment with you.

golden: Yakanakisa uye inopenya, ine mataurirwo egoridhe.
Elegant and bright, with golden accents.
forest: Yakasikwa uye yakapfava ine yakapfava girinhi.
Natural and sober with soft greens.
rose: Inodziya uye yakapfava, ine pink hues.
Warm and delicate, with pink hues.
linen-soft: Chiedza uye chisina kwazvakarerekera, chine serene uye chisingaperi kuvapo.
Light and neutral, with a serene and timeless presence.
blush-pearl: Yakapfava uye ine rudo, ine pearly pink toni.
Soft and romantic, with pearly pink tones.
lavender-mist: Yakachena uye yakanyarara, ine lavender uye mauve hues.
Fresh and serene, with lavender and mauve hues.
champagne-bubble: Kupenya uye kufara, nekupenya kwegoridhe rinodziya.
Bright and festive, with warm golden sparkles.
amber-night: Yakasviba uye inoyevedza, ine amber uye goridhe zvinopenya.
Dark and elegant, with amber and gold highlights.
onyx-gold: Yakadzika uye yakaoma, ine goridhe rakasimba pane yakasviba kumashure.
Deep and sophisticated, with intense gold on dark background.
midnight-royal: Yakanyanya kusviba bhuruu negoridhe rakasimba uye kuvepo kwakadzikama.
Very dark blue with intense gold and solemn presence.
burgundy-velvet: Inodziya uye yakafukidzira, newaini tsvuku uye inopenya yegoridhe.
Warm and enveloping, with red wine and golden sparkles.
sapphire-night: Bhuruu yakadzika ine mataurirwo esirivha uye kuvapo kwakanyarara.
Deep blue with silver accents and serene presence.
emerald-grove: Yakadzama yegirini yechisikigo ine goridhe uye inoyevedza hues.
Deep natural green with golden and elegant hues.
plum-twilight: Yakanyanya yepepuru ine pink uye inopenya inopenya.
Intense purple with pink and romantic sparkles.
rainbow: Celebration of diverse love with rainbow colors.
trans: Bhuruu, pink uye chena mukuremekedza kune trans mureza.
Blue, pink and white in tribute to the trans flag.
nonbinary: Yero, chena, yepepuru uye dema kune isiri binary mureza.
Yellow, white, purple and black for the non-binary flag.
lesbian: Orange, chena uye pink yemureza wengochani.
Orange, white and pink of the lesbian flag.
bi: Pink, purple and blue of the bi flag.
pan: Pink, yero uye yebhuruu yepani mureza.
Pink, yellow and blue of the pan flag.
ace: Dema, grey, chena uye yepepuru yemureza weasexual.
Black, gray, white and purple of the asexual flag.
